title: Cyrtochilum cordatum
taxonomy: Cyrtochilum cordatum is a species of orchid. Cyrtochilum cordatum is classified within the family Orchidaceae. Within this family, it is placed in the subfamily Orchidoideae and the tribe Maxillarieae. The genus Cyrtochilum is further classified under the subtribe Maxillariinae. Cyrtochilum cordatum is native to Central and South America.
